_comment: Merged Johto+Kanto Overheard lines. verified:false until QA (CURATION_TODO.md).

new-bark-town.text: My research is all about Pokémon evolution! Oh — and could you run an errand for me?

cherrygrove-city.text: I'm the Guide Gent! Follow me — I'll show you everything this town has to offer!

violet-city.text: The Elder of the tower here teaches that all living things are equal.

azalea-town.text: Slowpoke are precious to this town! Whoever's been cutting their tails — unforgivable!

goldenrod-city.text: Biggest city in Johto! The Radio Tower, the Department Store, the Magnet Train — we have it all!

ecruteak-city.text: Two great towers once stood here. One burned to the ground long ago…

olivine-city.text: Our Gym Leader hasn't left the Lighthouse in days. The Pokémon up there is very sick…

cianwood-city.text: My husband trains under the waterfall every single day. Rain or shine!

mahogany-town.text: Try our famous RageCandyBar! …No, this shop is not a hideout. Why do you ask?

blackthorn-city.text: The den behind this city is sacred. Only those the Elder approves may enter.

dark-cave.text: It's pitch black in here! Without Flash I can't see my own Pokémon!

sprout-tower.text: The great pillar sways but never breaks — like a Bellsprout's stalk.

ruins-of-alph.text: These carvings on the walls… they look like they're watching us, don't they?

union-cave.text: This cave links three roads. Easy to get in — hard to pick your way out!

slowpoke-well.text: They were down this well, cutting off Slowpoke Tails to sell. The nerve!

ilex-forest.text: The forest's protector rests in that tiny shrine. Show it respect.

national-park.text: I'm going to win the Bug-Catching Contest this week! Me and my Scyther!

pokeathlon-dome.text: Jump! Dash! Throw! Here, your Pokémon's athletic dreams come true!

burned-tower.text: Ten years I've chased the beast that fled this tower. TEN years!

bell-tower.text: A rainbow-colored Pokémon once perched at the very top of this tower.

johto-lighthouse.text: Amphy's light guides every ship home to Olivine. Climb up and say hello!

cliff-cave.text: These cliffs stack three layers high. Only real climbers pass through here.

johto-safari-zone.text: Welcome to the brand-new Safari Zone! You can even rearrange the areas!

mt-mortar.text: A karate master trains alone somewhere deep inside this mountain.

lake-of-rage.text: A RED Gyarados?! In this lake?! Grab your rod, kid!

ice-path.text: The ice in here never melts. One wrong step and you slide all the way back!

whirl-islands.text: The whirlpools guard something — a Pokémon they call the god of the sea.

embedded-tower.text: A tower, embedded right into the cliff face… Who could have built such a thing?

sinjoh-ruins.text: Where the cultures of two regions meet, the Original One may appear.

dragons-den.text: You stand in sacred ground. Answer truly: what do Pokémon mean to you?

johto-route-29.text: You can't catch Pokémon without Poké Balls! Trust me, I tried.

johto-route-30.text: My Rattata is in the top percentage of all Rattata!

johto-route-31.text: The tower in the city ahead? The Sages there test your bond with Pokémon.

johto-route-32.text: Longest route in Johto, this one. The Pokémon Center is still a ways off…

johto-route-33.text: It's always drizzling on this little road. My Pokémon love the mud!

johto-route-34.text: The Day Care is just up the road — my grandpa runs it with grandma!

johto-route-35.text: The gate ahead leads into the park. No littering, no running, no Weedle!

johto-route-36.text: A weird tree blocked this road for YEARS. Turns out it danced when you watered it!

johto-route-37.text: On stormy nights, they say three legendary beasts race past this very spot.

johto-route-38.text: Strong trainers line this road — everyone's toughening up before Olivine.

johto-route-39.text: Our poor Miltank stopped giving milk… She just needs Oran Berries and love.

johto-sea-route-40.text: The sea is calm today — perfect for the long swim out to the islands!

johto-sea-route-41.text: Feel that pull? The whirlpools ahead will spit you right back out!

johto-route-42.text: A mountain splits this route clean in half. Flying over beats climbing through!

johto-route-43.text: Those gate guards charging a toll? They're not even real guards!

johto-route-44.text: Weather changes fast up here. The pond's full of Poliwag, though!

johto-route-45.text: This mountain road only goes DOWN. Pick your path before you hop!

johto-route-46.text: See those ledges? You can hop down, but there's no climbing back up!

johto-route-47.text: Cliffs above, sea caves below. This road stacks three layers high!

johto-route-48.text: The grass out here grows taller than me! Wild Pokémon love it.

pallet-town.text: A world-famous Pokémon Lab, in our sleepy little town. Imagine that!

viridian-city.text: Our Gym stood empty for ages. The new Leader is from Pallet Town, they say.

pewter-city.text: The museum here keeps fossils of Pokémon from ancient times.

cerulean-city.text: A mermaid? Oh — you mean our Gym Leader. She swims like one!

vermilion-city.text: The S.S. Aqua sails from this port all the way to Olivine. All aboard!

lavender-town.text: The old tower is a Radio Tower now. The departed rest in the House of Memories.

celadon-city.text: The Department Store has EVERYTHING. My wallet never stood a chance!

saffron-city.text: Silph Co. towers over everything here. And our Gym Leader bends spoons with her mind.

fuchsia-city.text: The old Safari Zone is a preserve now. The Warden still misses the old days.

cinnabar-island.text: The volcano took the whole town… Only the Pokémon Center still stands.

indigo-plateau.text: Beyond this hall wait the Elite Four. Champions only past this point!

kanto-power-plant.text: We're back online! This plant powers the Magnet Train itself.

rock-tunnel.text: No lights in this tunnel — none! Without Flash it's a maze in the dark.

kanto-pal-park.text: Pokémon from faraway lands settle here. The park welcomes them all.

digletts-cave.text: Diglett dug this whole tunnel?! All the way to the other side of the mountains?!

mt-moon.text: On clear nights, Clefairy gather here to dance around the Moon Stone.

viridian-forest.text: A natural maze full of Bug Pokémon! I could stay here forever!

seafoam-islands.text: Twin islands, mirrored across the strait — with icy caverns underneath.

cerulean-cave.text: Only proven masters may enter. Something impossibly strong lives in there.

tohjo-falls.text: These falls mark the border — one region behind you, another ahead.

mt-silver.text: Even the League fears this mountain. A lone trainer waits at the peak, they say…

kanto-victory-road.text: So quiet in here now… everyone takes the waterfall shortcut these days.

kanto-route-1.text: Fresh country air! This little road runs straight between two towns.

kanto-route-2.text: The forest gate is just ahead — or cut through the Diglett tunnel if you're rushed!

kanto-route-3.text: Everyone on this path is itching for a battle. The mountain's just ahead!

kanto-route-4.text: The mountain tunnel spits you out here. It's all downhill to the city!

kanto-route-5.text: The Underground Path is closed off… you'll have to go through the big city's gate.

kanto-route-6.text: The port city is just south — you can smell the sea from here!

kanto-route-7.text: The big city's just west. I swear I can smell the Department Store perfume!

kanto-route-8.text: The gatehouse ahead used to demand a drink before letting anyone through. A DRINK!

kanto-route-9.text: Rocky path ahead — it dead-ends at a tunnel. Bring something that glows!

kanto-route-10.text: Hear that hum across the water? That's the Power Plant working again.

kanto-route-11.text: A giant sleeping Pokémon used to block this road. Snored like thunder!

kanto-route-12.text: This long wooden bridge is a fishing paradise. Quiet — they're biting!

kanto-route-13.text: These hedges twist into a maze! I've been lost for an hour…

kanto-route-14.text: The flocks fly low over the tall grass here. Perfect for training my birds!

kanto-route-15.text: Almost there! The sea wind carries the smell of the preserve up this road.

kanto-route-16.text: Cycling Road starts here — it's downhill the whole way! WHEEE!

kanto-route-17.text: Me and my bike are one on this slope. Try to keep up!

kanto-route-18.text: End of the Cycling Road! My legs are jelly, but what a ride.

kanto-sea-route-19.text: Straight south through open water — twin islands split the sea ahead.

kanto-sea-route-20.text: The current between the islands is fierce. Strong swimmers only!

kanto-sea-route-21.text: From the water here you can see the little town with the famous Lab!

kanto-route-22.text: The road to the League gate starts here. Rivals like to ambush challengers…

kanto-route-23.text: Only trainers with every badge make it this far up the mountain road.

kanto-route-24.text: This is Nugget Bridge! Beat five trainers in a row and win a golden prize!

kanto-route-25.text: The famous inventor's Sea Cottage sits at the very end of this path!

kanto-route-26.text: The League gate ahead checks for ALL sixteen badges. SIXTEEN!

kanto-route-27.text: Across the water behind you is a whole other region. This is where it begins!

kanto-route-28.text: The trail to the silver peak… Few climb it. Fewer come back down.
